about.text:
About Us - VICIVISION
Skip to content
VICIVISION UK
VICIVISION UK is the official supplier of VICIVISION and Metrios machines in the UK and Ireland, dedicated to providing best-in-class support and service to new and existing customers.
VICIVISION and Metrios are brands of the Vici & C. S.p.A. group, based in Italy, which has been producing electrical panels and industrial automation systems since 1977. In 2021, Vici & C. recorded a turnover of more than 65 million, with 200 employees, 4 branches, and 40 specialist centers worldwide.
Who are we?
As the UK’s sole partner for VICIVISION products, VICIVISION UK serves the whole of the UK and Ireland direct from the Advanced Innovation Centre in Derby. We offer a wide range of solutions for all part inspection requirements, as well as service and maintenance, training, installation and subcontract measurement.
Meet our team
Who do we work with?
We have built up a loyal customer base of blue-chip companies throughout the UK who trust our knowledge and expertise to help them transform inspection capabilities. Our customers cover a wide range of industries, including aerospace, medical, automotive, rubber and plastics, injection moulding and many more.
Customer stories
Unrivalled expertise
Whether you are looking to streamline your inspection or improve the quality of parts you are producing, VICIVISION can provide expertise and experience to find the right solution for you. We have unrivalled knowledge in how to maximise the productivity and reliability of your quality control processes, helping you to save the most time and amplify your inspection.
VICIVISION measuring machines provide futureproof capabilities.
VICIVISION manufactures non-contact optical machines that measure the external profile of turned and ground parts, which ranges from shafts to micro-mechanical parts used in industries such as dental and watchmaking. VICIVISION measuring systems are distributed worldwide and used directly on the shopfloor. Our machines have been designed to operate effortlessly and efficiently ensuring customers reduce waste while optimising their investment.
Our history
Discover more about the history of VICIVISION and VICIVISION UK, from where the technology started to how it became world-leading optical measurement systems.
1977
VICI & C is founded
VICI & C was founded in Italy, with a primary focus on the contracted assembly service of circuit boards.
1977
1989
Expanding capabilities
VICI & C diversified to designing and manufacturing automated inspection lines for components in the automotive industry.
1989
1999
VICIVISION is born
The request for vision measuring systems increased substantially and led to the creation of the VICIVISION brand.
1999
2015
Metrios division formed
Metrios was born as a division of VICI & C, providing 2D optical measurement for the shopfloor.
2015
2016
VICIVISION UK established
VICIVISION UK is formed and becomes the fourth division of the Carfulan Group, becoming the exclusive seller of VICIVISION and Metrios optical measurement systems in the UK and Ireland.
2016
We want to hear from you!
Find out more about our world-leading measurement systems.
You’ve discovered our story, now find out how we can help you to take your inspection to the next level with optical measurement systems from VICIVISION.
Get in touch
